title: Tibouchina galeottiana
taxonomy: Tibouchina galeottiana is classified within the family Melastomataceae and is a species of flowering plant native to Mexico. It is part of the genus Tibouchina, which comprises around 150 species of plants. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of Mexico, where it grows as an epiphyte or a terrestrial plant. The classification of Tibouchina galeottiana places it within the order Myrtales, which includes various flowering plants. The plant's specific classification is further defined by its unique characteristics and characteristics within the family Melastomataceae.
